query:
SELECT ao.id, ao.name, ao.priceExtra, ao.groupId, ag.name as groupName, ag.menuItemId, mi.name as itemName
FROM menu_addon_options ao
JOIN menu_addon_groups ag ON ao.groupId = ag.id
JOIN menu_items mi ON ag.menuItemId = mi.id
WHERE ao.name LIKE '%Frango%' OR ao.name LIKE '%Bov%'
ORDER BY mi.name, ag.name, ao.name;
command:
